use rayon::prelude::*;

// BAD: parallel iteration for trivial per-item work on small input
fn check_all_enabled(items: &[Item]) -> bool {
    items.par_iter().all(|item| item.enabled)
}

fn filter_by_name<'a>(items: &'a [Item], name: &str) -> Vec<&'a Item> {
    items.par_iter()
        .filter(|item| item.name == name)
        .collect()
}

fn count_lines(files: &[PathBuf]) -> usize {
    files.par_iter()
        .map(|f| std::fs::read_to_string(f).unwrap().lines().count())
        .sum()
}
